comment_content:
Computer architecture is an interesting topic for me, but the course coverage is very limited. It spends 1/3 to even 1/2 of total time reviewing the stuff already taught in COMP2611. Mostly consists of shallow concepts with very limited hands-on stuff (the PA is okay, but nothing else). I don't think there is any "Design and Analysis" stuff as the course title says.

After all, it's a course newly offered after many years being disappeared. Professor Alex said that he might plan to add some project stuff in the future to enrich the content. Let's wait and see.
comment_teaching: Alex is a nice professor who knows a lot and always willing to help students. But his teaching pace still has room for improvement, for he sometimes keep repeating some intuitive stuff, or explain some simple stuff in a more complicated way. I think he is a bit nervous while teaching. But it is not a big deal as long as you have interests in computer architectures stuff.
comment_workload: Light, only 2 normal written assignments and a programming assignment. PA requires some deep thinking, and takes about 3 days to finish. But could be different in the future if more assignments and projects are added (which is a good thing I suppose).
comment_grading:
25% A range (15 in 60 people), the largest possible for a UG COMP course. But as students are too smart and competitive, and it is too easy to mess up the whole exam due to small careless mistakes, I could only give a C.

Written Assignment: 15% (7.5% each)
PA: 10%
Midterm: 25%
Final: 50%

Midterm:
Low/ LQ/ Mean/ Median/ UQ/ High
61 / 82.5 / 87.4 / 91 / 95.5 / 100

Final:
Low/ LQ/ Mean/ Median/ UQ/ High
27 / 49.75 / 59.97 / 59.5 / 71.75 / 87

Me:
HW1: 100/100
HW2: 95/100
PA: 100/100
Midterm: 89/100
Final: 78/100
Result: A- (overall slightly above UQ, should be one of the lowest A-, I'm grateful enough)

Usually 89 should be a satisfying score, but the UQ for midterm is 95.5...unbelievable. Loosing marks in assignments is also dangerous especially when your overall score is around UQ like me.

comment_content:
around 1/2 of what is taught in CMU and ETH in one term (Prof Onur Mutlu)

Not hard, just some concepts and simple calculation involved.  The difficult part of original course content in CMU is taken away.
comment_teaching: Please just watch Onur Mutlu's online videos. Prof HUI. Pan is not an expert at this area.
comment_workload: Light since everything is easy. People all get high score in assignments and project (just a simple coding work in python).
comment_grading:
full mark in mid and 90+ in final. Got an A+.
Do practice and you can easily get a high score. Find materials at Onur Mutlu's course website. Actually some questions in final are directly copied from Onur Mutlu's past papers.

comment_content:
已經停開幾年，突然間重新再開，又enroll唔到COMP4521，CPEG學生為了畢業，只能來讀這個course。

和另一個post一樣，懶得寫
comment_teaching:
Prof Hui幾好人，上堂有好多筆記外的內容，結果就系教得慢；
考試時間本來定在最後一堂，後來跟大家上堂討論後，特意推遲了兩天。同埋，個course 39人，上堂人數長期不夠12個人，可能大家都看video？
comment_workload:
慘過上Lang，三份essay，總共3000字，還要找其他paper來寫奇奇怪怪strength、weakness、improvements；每次寫完的時候，我都問自己一個問題，“我究竟寫緊咩？？？” 我希望假如日後還保留essay環節，請TA先看一下究竟份paper是不是真的有三個strength、三個weakness、及六個improvement，有時候真的寫到吐血。

Final系open notes，所以不用花太多時間review，而且最後出乎意料簡單，我懷疑出卷時間不超過3個小時.....
comment_grading:
Essay 1: 15/15
Essay 2: 14.85/15
Essay 3: 15/15
Assignment 1: 15/15
Assignment 2: 14/15
Final: 24/25
Overall: 97.85/100
Garde: A+

Essay：今年因為疫情獨有的部分，我的感覺是引用得越多，就越高分，同埋最後寫有咩take-home message和technical lesson，有幾大吹幾大。

Assignment: 全部抄往年assignment及其他大學，改左d數字還要改錯，還要我發email提醒TA才發現；題目描述極度不清晰，不看solution基本沒有人明白出題者在想什麼。

Final: 簡單到一個點，完全唔需要用腦，只有有上堂就OK

comment_content:
1. Introduction and fundamental concepts
2. ISA and its trade off
3. MIPS ISA and Microarchitecture
4. Pipelining
5. Data hazards in pipelining
6. Branch prediction
7. Instruction level parallelism
8. SIMD and GPU
9. Memory hierarchy
10. Cache
11. Virtual memory
12. Multiprocessor
13. Memory consistency
14. cache coherence

Because I am cse student and I have studied comp3511 the semester before, the second half of the course is quite easy for me. The first half may need to take more time to study. This course may look like provided for cpeg students. But the content is simple for cse students too.
comment_teaching:
The professor is good and the notes provide enough information for me. After every zoom meeting, there will be a few minutes for us to ask questions.

The TA provides good tutorial notes. If you have any questions in the assignment, you can find similar questions in the notes easily.
comment_workload: Low workload compared with other comp course. Assignments are easy and essay only need to follow the instructions to answer the questions in different paragraph. Exam has same difficulty as assignment. No midterm exam so you can start studying the whole course in the exam period.
comment_grading:
2 Assignments: 30%
3 Research reports: 45%
Exam: 25%

Very easy to get high marks in assignment and report. If you attend every lecture and tutorial class, you will be able to get at least 60% out of 75%. I only study for the exam about 5 hours and get 70% in the final because it is similar to assignment. overall 80%:B+
